overview.description: AI-native decision intelligence platform for embedded and agentic analytics
overview.description_long: GoodData is a composable data and analytics platform designed to power AI-enabled, agentic, and embedded decision-making with a governed semantic layer. The platform enables organizations to build, embed, and scale AI-infused analytics apps, dashboards, and agentic workflows. Serves over 123,000 enterprises and 3.9 million users across 23 countries.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 2007 by Roman Stanek as a cloud-native business intelligence and analytics platform. Pioneered Data as a Service (DaaS) and headless BI before evolving into an AI-native decision intelligence platform.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by Roman Stanek
Launched GoodData.CN (cloud-native platform) and announced $45M credit facility from J.P. Morgan
Strategic investment and partnership with Visa (Fintech Partner Connect program)
Named in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Analytics and BI Platforms

awards: 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Analytics and BI Platforms

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: GoodData's governed semantic layer and deeply embedded analytics platform provide meaningful differentiation, as enterprise customers depend on complex data models and multi-tenant governance that pure LLM APIs cannot replace. However, the core BI/analytics query capability is increasingly commoditized by foundation models, putting pressure on standalone dashboarding features.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Business intelligence and embedded analytics is a large, established market with sustained enterprise demand. GoodData's 123,000+ customer base and recognition in the Gartner Magic Quadrant confirm proven PMF. The data monetization and embedded analytics trend favors their platform approach.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: GoodData has raised $125M in total funding from tier-1 investors (Andreessen Horowitz, General Catalyst, Intel Capital) and secured a $45M credit facility from J.P. Morgan in 2021. With an estimated $63M revenue and 123K+ customers, the company has a stable financial foundation.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Well-funded scaleup with established enterprise customer base and recognized platform, but faces ongoing commoditization pressure in the BI/analytics space from both large cloud vendors (AWS, Google, Microsoft) and foundation model capabilities. The governed semantic layer is the key differentiator but must continue to evolve.

metadata.notes: San Francisco listed as official corporate HQ address; main engineering and product teams are in Prague and Brno. Total funding of $125M from Tracxn (11 rounds, 20 investors); $45M JP Morgan credit facility confirmed via press release. Revenue estimate from RocketReach (~$63M) is approximate.
